title: Child Neil Record
description: One entry in ~/.neil/cluster/nodes/ describing a child Neil instance spawned by this parent.

provider.description: IaaS provider or 'local' for same-host subprocess.

transport.description: How the parent reaches this child.

endpoint.description: ssh user@host, http URL, or filesystem path.

queue_path.description: Path on child where prompts are dropped (absolute on child's filesystem).

ip.description: Public IP (null if no public IP / not yet assigned).

last_heartbeat.description: Last time child sent a heartbeat to parent; null before first beat.
